templates.name: Default (custom tuned)
templates.description: Clean minimal base with navy + red accent palette. Left-aligned body text, serif-free, conservative whitespace.
templates.best_for: Conference talks, dense technical content, academic audiences

templates.name: Gaia
templates.description: Warmer rounded aesthetic, centered lead slides, more whitespace. Built-in Marp theme with orange accents.
templates.best_for: Lectures, tutorials, educational content, lay audiences

templates.name: Uncover
templates.description: Minimalist centered layout, larger type, maximum whitespace. One idea per slide.
templates.best_for: Keynotes, short talks, high-impact visual storytelling

templates.name: Dark Academia
templates.description: Dark gradient background, cyan + amber accents, Inter + JetBrains Mono typefaces. High-contrast tech aesthetic.
templates.best_for: ML/AI/engineering audiences, code-heavy talks, evening/dim-room venues

templates.name: Mindmaps Boost
templates.description: Warm radial gradient from cream to coral, bold left-aligned sans-serif headlines, editorial aesthetic. Inspired by SlidesGo's Mind Maps Boost theme.
templates.best_for: Design-forward talks, creative industry, lifestyle/narrative presentations, warm branded decks
